---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who experiences it?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature. Include example CLI usage if applicable:

```bash
inode <your proposed command>
```

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you considered and why you prefer this one.

## Phase

Which development phase does this belong to?
- [ ] Phase 1 — Local MVP
- [ ] Phase 2 — Cloud / multi-user
- [ ] Phase 3 — LLM Swappability
- [ ] Phase 4 — Hardening
- [ ] Phase 5 — Ecosystem

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
